prompt: Mid-session turn with designer directive about channel retry semantics. Tests element type usage, visible/invisible separation.

assertions.name: designer-statement-becomes-rule
assertions.description: Retry semantics directive captured as RULE, not EVIDENCE

assertions.name: uses-new-mcp-types
assertions.description: Uses EVIDENCE/RULE/NECESSARY_CONDITION, not old type names

assertions.name: no-code-in-visible-output
assertions.description: Designer-visible section has no code, JSON, element IDs, or proof terminology

assertions.name: visible-reads-as-conversation
assertions.description: Designer-visible section reads like a colleague talking, not a system outputting
